rules.instruction: A green test suite does not prove that the requested task was implemented.
Compare task requirements with the actual Git diff and changed files.
Reject coding tasks that produce no allowed-file changes.
Reject changes outside the allowed writable file set.
Reject tests that do not invoke production behavior or use placeholders.
Reject unexpected removal of existing module-level functions or classes.
Evaluate Builder status first. Run downstream checks only after Builder success.
Test execution must not be contaminated by temporary shell variables such as OPENAI_API_BASE.
